meaning: buz kashi 马背叼羊(阿富汗的全国性体育活动)
examples: Buzkashi translated into English means "goat grabbing."
I remember one time Baba took me to the yearly "Buzkashi" tournament that took place on the first day of spring, New year's day.
Buzkashi is akin to polo, but players on horseback use a headless goat carcass instead of a ball.
Kam Air sponsors teams in volleyball, football, cricket and buzkashi (literally, goat grabbing), a national sport akin to polo.
